title: lippia plicata
intro: Lippia plicata, also known as the bush tea plant or sweet marjoram, is a perennial herb native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lippia plicata include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as reduced stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lippia plicata can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
